title: Do Not Sell / Share Link
description: The policy must disclose whether user personal information is sold or shared and explain the right to opt-out.
fix: Add a section clarifying data selling practices and provide a 'Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information' option.

title: Right to Request Deletion
description: The policy must inform California consumers of their right to request deletion of their personal information.
fix: Specify that consumers have the right to request deletion and explain how they can submit such requests.
